atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain for approximately three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the left shoulder pain is linked to basement renovation work.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty with overhead movements.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain when lying on the affected shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes two extra-strength Tylenol every six to eight hours.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes two extra-strength Tylenol.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has experienced similar aches and pains in the past.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals limited active and passive range of motion in the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals tenderness to palpation of the greater tuberosity.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals capillary refill less than three seconds.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals intact light touch sensation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No signs of neurovascular compromise were observed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes an MRI of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers the patient to physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to continue taking extra-strength Tylenol as needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in four weeks.
